title: Dreams and Drapes - Marinelli - Easy Care Duvet Cover Set, Single Bed Size, Teal Bedding
features: Marinelli by Dreams & Drapes has been adapted from an early Jacobean hand-drawn floral design. Designed in the UK and featuring ornamental hand-drawn floral trails on a cream beige background
Dreams & Drapes is a trusted quality UK bedding brand, presenting the latest trends and styles in bedroom furnishings
Fits a standard UK Single duvet quilt size: 140cm Width x 200cm Length (53x79") - Pillowcase size 76cm x 48cm
Fabric: 52% Polyester, 48% Cotton (Thread Count - 150) | Care: Minimal ironing, easy care fabric. 40⁰ Wash, Do not bleach, low heat tumble dry, do not dry clean
Pack Contents: 1 x Single Duvet Cover and matching 1 x Pillowcase. Complete the look by buying the matching Marinelli Teal Bedspread & Curtains
description: From the manufacturer Dreams & Drapes Design Dreams & Drapes is a trusted quality UK bedding brand, presenting the latest trends and styles in bedroom furnishings. Marinelli This stunning design and colouring brings the Italian Rivera to your bedroom. The Marinelli Duvet Cover Set offers a colourful multi panel patchwork face and a bold baroque floral reverse, complete the full bedroom range with the matching bedspread and pencil pleat curtains. Easy Care Printed on easy care polycotton and available in two beautiful colourways; grey and teal. Reversible Design Designed in the UK and featuring ornamental hand-drawn floral trails with a complementary patchwork reverse. Pillowcases Included Each bedding set comes complete with matching pillowcases: Single (x1), Double (x2), King (x2) and Super-King (x2) Colour(s) Teal, Grey Fabric Polycotton Thread Count 150 Washing Instructions Machine wash at 40º Iron Yes Tumble Dry Yes, on low temperature Closure Poppers Sizes Available Single, Double, King, Super King Charlotte Florence Grace Mishka Spring Glade Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 24 4.4 out of 5 stars 470 4.4 out of 5 stars 766 4.2 out of 5 stars 108 4.0 out of 5 stars 91
